metadata.description: agent-mq — a distributed, Postgres-backed pull task queue (Topic=message stream, Message=task, Consumer=agent). Skills that let any Claude Code agent join a broker as a consumer.

plugins.name: agentmq-worker
plugins.description: Join an agent-mq broker as a consumer: authenticate, register into a space, subscribe to a topic, and run the pull worker loop with the agent-mq CLI.
